tests.scenario: Notification Arrives During Active Session
steps: Start an audio session
Trigger a notification from another app while the session is playing
Observe the state of the audio session
tests.expected_result: The audio session continues playing without pausing, skipping, or terminating.

tests.scenario: User Switches Away and Returns During Session
steps: Start an audio session
Switch to another app while the session is playing
Return to the Calm app
Observe the state of the audio session
tests.expected_result: The audio session has continued playing uninterrupted while the app was in the background and is still playing upon return.

tests.scenario: Notification Triggered During Quiet Hours Window
steps: Define a quiet hours window
Trigger a notification during that window
Observe whether the notification is delivered
tests.expected_result: The notification is not delivered to the user during the quiet hours window.

tests.scenario: Notification Delivered After Quiet Hours Window Ends
steps: Define a quiet hours window
Trigger a notification during that window
Wait for the quiet hours window to end
Observe whether the notification is delivered
tests.expected_result: The notification is delivered to the user after the quiet hours window has ended.

tests.scenario: Audio Stops When Sleep Timer Elapses
steps: Start an audio session
Set a sleep timer for a short period
Wait for the timer to elapse
Observe the state of audio playback
tests.expected_result: Audio playback stops when the timer elapses.

tests.scenario: Audio Does Not Resume After Sleep Timer Stops It
steps: Start an audio session
Set a sleep timer for a short period
Wait for the timer to elapse and audio to stop
Wait an additional period and observe whether audio resumes
tests.expected_result: Audio playback does not resume automatically after being stopped by the sleep timer.

tests.scenario: Search by Keyword Returns Matching Content
steps: Navigate to the content search
Enter a keyword such as 'thunderstorm'
Submit the query
Observe the results
tests.expected_result: Content matching the keyword 'thunderstorm' is displayed to the user.

tests.scenario: Search by Category Returns Matching Content
steps: Navigate to the content search
Enter a category such as 'sleep stories'
Submit the query
Observe the results
tests.expected_result: Content belonging to the 'sleep stories' category is displayed to the user.

tests.scenario: Unplayed Content Appears Before Played Content
steps: Play one or more content items
Navigate to the content listing
Observe the order in which content is presented
tests.expected_result: Content items the user has not previously played appear before content items the user has already played.

tests.scenario: All Content Played — Unplayed Priority Still Applied on New Content
steps: Play all available content items in a category
Check for any newly added content item in that category
Navigate to the content listing
Observe the order in which content is presented
tests.expected_result: The newly added content item that the user has not played appears before previously played content items.

tests.scenario: Higher-Rated Content Appears Before Lower-Rated Content
steps: Rate one content item with a high rating
Rate another content item in the same category with a lower rating
Navigate to the content listing for that category
Observe the order in which the two items are presented
tests.expected_result: The higher-rated content item appears before the lower-rated content item.

tests.scenario: Updating a Rating Changes Content Order
steps: Rate content item A higher than content item B
Observe that item A appears before item B
Change the rating of item B to be higher than item A
Observe the updated order of the two items
tests.expected_result: After the rating change, content item B now appears before content item A.

tests.scenario: Excluded Content Does Not Appear in Recommendations
steps: Exclude a specific content item
Navigate to the recommendations or content listing
Observe whether the excluded item appears
tests.expected_result: The excluded content item does not appear anywhere in the user's recommendations or content listing.

tests.scenario: Excluded Content Is Not Auto-Selected
steps: Exclude a specific content item
Allow the system to auto-select content for the user
Observe whether the excluded item is selected
tests.expected_result: The excluded content item is not auto-selected by the system.

tests.scenario: Pricing Visible Before Account Creation Prompt
steps: Open the app as a new user for the first time
Proceed through the onboarding flow
Observe whether subscription pricing is shown before the account creation prompt appears
tests.expected_result: The subscription price, billing frequency, and included features are visible to the user before the account creation prompt is presented.

tests.scenario: Pricing Visible Before Payment Details Are Requested
steps: Open the app as a new user for the first time
Proceed through the onboarding flow
Observe whether subscription pricing is shown before payment details are requested
tests.expected_result: The subscription price, billing frequency, and included features are visible to the user before any payment details are requested.

tests.scenario: Free Meditation Session Plays Without Subscription Prompt
steps: Open the app without an active subscription
Select a designated free meditation session
Observe whether a subscription prompt appears during playback
tests.expected_result: The meditation session plays in full without a subscription prompt appearing at any point.

tests.scenario: Free Sleep Story and Soundscape Play Without Subscription Prompt
steps: Open the app without an active subscription
Select a designated free sleep story and play it to completion
Select a designated free soundscape and play it
Observe whether a subscription prompt appears during either
tests.expected_result: Both the sleep story and soundscape play in full without a subscription prompt appearing.

tests.scenario: Acute Anxiety Relief Session Plays Without Subscription
steps: Open the app without an active subscription
Navigate to and select an acute anxiety relief session
Observe whether a subscription prompt appears
tests.expected_result: The acute anxiety relief session plays in full without a subscription prompt appearing.

tests.scenario: Acute Anxiety Relief Session Remains Free After Subscription Lapses
steps: Let an active subscription lapse or cancel it
Navigate to and select an acute anxiety relief session
Observe whether a subscription prompt appears
tests.expected_result: The acute anxiety relief session plays in full without a subscription prompt appearing, even after the subscription has lapsed.

tests.scenario: User Cancels Subscription Without Contacting Support
steps: Open the app with an active subscription
Initiate the cancellation process
Complete the cancellation without contacting customer support
Observe whether the subscription is cancelled and confirmation is received
tests.expected_result: The subscription is fully cancelled and the user receives confirmation that no further charges will be applied, without having needed to contact customer support.

tests.scenario: No Further Charges Applied After Cancellation
steps: Cancel an active subscription
Wait for the next scheduled billing date to pass
Check whether any charge was applied
tests.expected_result: No charge is applied on or after the cancellation confirmation date.

tests.scenario: Trial-to-Paid Notification Sent One Week Before Conversion
steps: Begin a free trial
Advance time to one week before the trial conversion date
Observe whether a notification is received
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification informing them of the upcoming paid conversion one week before it occurs.

tests.scenario: Trial-to-Paid Notification Sent 48 Hours Before Conversion
steps: Begin a free trial
Advance time to 48 hours before the trial conversion date
Observe whether a notification is received
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification informing them of the upcoming paid conversion 48 hours before it occurs.

tests.scenario: Trial-to-Paid Notification Sent 4 Hours Before Conversion
steps: Begin a free trial
Advance time to 4 hours before the trial conversion date
Observe whether a notification is received
tests.expected_result: The user receives a notification informing them of the upcoming paid conversion 4 hours before it occurs.

tests.scenario: Billing Details Display Subscription Tier and Next Billing Date
steps: Open the app with an active subscription
Navigate to the billing details
Observe what information is displayed
tests.expected_result: The current subscription tier and next billing date are both displayed.

tests.scenario: Billing Details Display Next Charge Amount
steps: Open the app with an active subscription
Navigate to the billing details
Observe whether the next charge amount is displayed
tests.expected_result: The next billing amount is displayed alongside the subscription tier and next billing date.

tests.scenario: Refund Request Acknowledged Within 48 Hours
steps: Submit a refund request
Record the submission timestamp
Wait 48 hours
Check whether an acknowledgement has been received
tests.expected_result: An acknowledgement has been received within 48 hours of the refund request submission.

tests.scenario: Refund Acknowledgement Contains Reference Number and Resolution Timeframe
steps: Submit a refund request
Wait for the acknowledgement to arrive
Inspect the contents of the acknowledgement
tests.expected_result: The acknowledgement contains a reference number and a stated expected resolution timeframe.

tests.scenario: App Recovers and Offers Resume After Crash During Session
steps: Start an audio session
Force close or crash the app mid-session
Reopen the app
Observe whether the app launches without error and offers a resume option
tests.expected_result: The app launches without error and presents the user with the option to resume the session from the point at which it was interrupted.

tests.scenario: App Recovers and Offers Resume After Unexpected Closure
steps: Start an audio session
Unexpectedly close the app via the device task manager
Reopen the app
Observe whether the app launches without error and offers a resume option
tests.expected_result: The app launches without error and presents the user with the option to resume the session from the point at which it was interrupted.

tests.scenario: Navigation Path to Major Category Is Consistent Across Sessions
steps: From the app's starting point, navigate to the sleep stories category and note the path taken
Return to the app's starting point
Navigate to the sleep stories category again
Compare the two navigation paths
tests.expected_result: The same navigation path leads to the sleep stories category on both occasions.

tests.scenario: Navigation to Major Category Does Not Require Passing Through Unrelated Screens
steps: From the app's starting point, navigate to each major content category
Record every screen passed through on the way to each category
Inspect the recorded paths for unrelated screens
tests.expected_result: No navigation path to a major content category requires the user to pass through screens unrelated to that category.
